title: Mosvera Template
description: A reusable aesthetic starting point. A template MAY extend exactly one parent template via $extends (single inheritance, MEP-0002). Its aesthetic content is an open object at v0.1 — structure and naming are constrained, the aesthetic vocabulary is not yet frozen. SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0.

$schema.description: Identifies this document as a Mosvera template of a given version.

id.description: The template's own name, by which compositions and other templates reference it.

$extends.description: Single-inheritance parent reference (MEP-0002). Resolved as a linear ancestor chain folded with the merge operation; the inheritance graph MUST be a DAG (cycle detection is a conformance requirement). A list value is NOT permitted at v0.1 — multiple inheritance is a gated future possibility.
